title: 時間副詞子句 before / after / until

formulas.zh: 時間從句置於主句前，用逗號分隔
時間從句置於主句後，通常不加逗號

explanation: before/after/until 引導時間從句，表達動作發生的時間關係。before 指主句動作在從句動作之前完成；after 指主句動作在從句動作之後；until 指主句動作持續到從句動作發生為止。not...until 強調「直到才」的延遲關係。從句可放在主句前（加逗號）或後（通常不加逗號）。時態上，從句通常用簡單式表示，主句根據上下文選用。

examples.eng: Before you leave, please turn off all the lights in the classroom.
examples.chi: 在你離開之前，請關掉教室裡的所有燈。

examples.eng: After the exam was finished, all students felt relieved and excited.
examples.chi: 考試結束後，所有學生都感到鬆了一口氣，也很興奮。

examples.eng: You should wait until your father comes home before making any decisions.
examples.chi: 你應該等到你父親回家後再做任何決定。

examples.eng: She didn't realize how important the project was until she started working on it.
examples.chi: 直到她開始做這個專案，她才意識到它有多重要。

extension.tip: 區分 until 與 before：until 強調動作持續到某點停止，before 強調時間點前已完成。not...until 中，not 修飾主句動詞，整句強調延遲或相反的預期。確保主句與從句的時態搭配邏輯，避免無關或混亂的時間關係。

examples.test: He studied hard before the exam.
examples.result: → 正確。exam 前有時間點，studied 在 exam 前完成。

examples.test: He studied until the exam started. (He studied hard until the exam started.)
examples.result: → 正確。studied 這個動作持續到 exam started 為止。

examples.test: He didn't study until the exam started.
examples.result: → 正確。不study 這個動作延續到 exam started 這一刻才停止，暗示浪費時間。

extension.note: before=提前完成，until=持續到那刻，not...until=延遲到那刻才做。

exercises.sentence: We cannot go outside until the rain stops.
exercises.translation: 直到雨停為止，我們都不能出去。

parts: you finish your homework, you may watch television.
exercises.sentence: After you finish your homework, you may watch television.
exercises.translation: 你完成作業後，就可以看電視。

parts: Students didn't know the test results
the teacher announced them in class.
exercises.sentence: Students didn't know the test results until the teacher announced them in class.
exercises.translation: 直到老師在課堂上宣布成績，學生們才知道測驗結果。

parts: we arrived at the station, the train had already left.
exercises.sentence: Before we arrived at the station, the train had already left.
exercises.translation: 在我們到達車站之前，火車已經離開了。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的時間連接詞，完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ you finish your homework, you can play video games.
mc_exercises.explanation: 答案是 A。句意為「完成功課後，你可以玩電動」，表示主句動作（可以玩）在從句動作（完成功課）之後，應用 after。B選項 before 意思相反（功課完成前就能玩，不合理）；C選項 until 表「持續到...為止」（直到完成才能玩，過於嚴格）；D選項 unless 是「除非」，用法與上下文不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的時間連接詞和時態搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: The children were playing happily _______ their mother came home from work.
mc_exercises.explanation: 答案是 B。句意為「母親下班回家前，孩子們玩得很開心」，主句動作（玩）在從句動作（回家）之前持續進行，應用 before。A選項 until 表「直到...為止」會變成「玩到媽媽回家為止」，與下文邏輯不符；C選項 after 表時間關係相反；D選項 unless 是條件句，用法不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 理解 not...until 的延遲關係，選擇適當完成
mc_exercises.question_eng: She did not realize how important the project was _______ she had completed half of it.
mc_exercises.explanation: 答案是 B。句意為「直到完成一半，她才意識到該項目的重要性」，這是 not...until 的典型用法，表示延遲或對比。A選項 before 會造成時態邏輯混亂；C選項 after 改變句意為「完成後才意識到」，失去 not 的強調效果；D選項 while 表同時進行，不符合延遲關係。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句型：判斷時間從句的位置和時態搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the company had reviewed all applications, the HR department _______ the final candidates for the interview next month.
mc_exercises.explanation: 答案是 C。前半句用 after 表示主句動作（公佈）在從句動作（審查完成）之後；從句用過去完成式 had reviewed（動作已完成），主句用簡單過去式 announced（表敘述過去事實）。A選項 would announce 用於未來不當；B選項 before 時間關係錯誤；D選項 until 表「持續到...為止」，邏輯不符。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 在你完成作業之前，不要看手機。
translation_exercises.answer: Before you finish your homework, don't check your phone. / Don't check your phone before you finish your homework.
key_points: Before + S + V 引導時間從句
祈使句搭配時間副詞子句
從句置於主句前需加逗號
hints: 提示1：使用 Before 結構時，從句可放主句前後；從句前加逗號
提示2：注意「完成」用 finish，不要用 complete；「看手機」用 check your phone 或 look at your phone

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他離開教室之後，才發現自己忘了帶書包。
translation_exercises.answer: After he left the classroom, he realized that he had forgotten his backpack. / He realized that he had forgotten his backpack after he left the classroom.
key_points: After + S + V 引導時間從句
主句過去完成式 had forgotten 表先前動作
從句用簡單過去式 left
hints: 提示1：After 從句動作先發生，主句動作後發生；從句置前加逗號
提示2：注意時態配搭——從句用 left (簡單過去)，主句用 realized (簡單過去) + had forgotten (過去完成式)

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我們要等到老師進來才能開始考試。
translation_exercises.answer: We cannot start the exam until the teacher comes in. / Until the teacher comes in, we cannot start the exam.
key_points: Until + S + V 引導時間從句
否定句搭配 until 表延遲關係
hints: 提示1：until 從句表達「直到…才」的延遲概念，通常搭配否定詞 not/cannot；從句用簡單現在式表未來
提示2：注意不能說『We can start...until』，must 搭配 until 時也需用否定結構 cannot/must not

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 直到他承認了錯誤，我們才願意原諒他，然而一切都已經太遲了。
translation_exercises.answer: Not until he admitted his mistake were we willing to forgive him, but by then everything was already too late. / We were not willing to forgive him until he admitted his mistake, but by then everything was already too late.
key_points: 倒裝結構『Not until + 從句 + 助動詞 + 主詞』
複合句結合對比意義（but 連接兩獨立子句）
hints: 提示1：『Not until』置於句首時引發倒裝，助動詞前移；若 until 在句尾則無倒裝。兩種位置都正確
提示2：注意『原諒』用 forgive；『承認』用 admit；『太遲』用 too late；時態搭配需一致（都用過去式）；倒裝版本『were we willing』語序
